candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.
Non-current, not current; included only because it was in the candidate list.
Balancing line, not a reported current-assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line and best match for CHE.
Semantically similar but appears unused/blank; less preferred than the cleaner reported cash line.
Restricted and long-term; not appropriate for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement line reconciles to ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash line rather than cash-flow reconciliation lines.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line; directly matches LCT definition.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not a reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Exact current-maturities debt line and cleanest non-lease short-term debt measure.
Likely the current borrowings line located within current liabilities, but duplicated elsewhere for non-current borrowings and therefore more ambiguous than the explicit due-within-1-year line.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit current debt maturity line. Excluded lease-related rows per instructions and avoided the more ambiguous duplicated 'Borrowings' labels.

candidates.why: Exact taxes payable/current tax liability line.
Exact reported PPE line and best match for total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Total Tangible Assets, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not a clean reported PPE figure.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related right-of-use asset detail, not total PPE.
Intangibles, not PPE.

variables.notes: R:nc. Preferred the clean reported PPE total/net line.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line; directly matches AT definition.
Candidate shortlist item, but often pre-interest/tax under IFRS and therefore less complete than net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Net cash generated from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact net cash flow from operating activities line; best match for OANCF.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash generated from operating activities

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist because it is the cleaner exact net operating cash flow line and better matches OANCF than 'Cash generated from operations'.
